pokemon:gouging-fire.name: Gouging Fire
pokemon:gouging-fire.summary: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.
It resembles an eerie Pokémon once shown in a paranormal magazine. That Pokémon was said to be an Entei regenerated from a fossil.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.

form:gouging-fire.name: Gouging Fire
form:gouging-fire.summary: Gouging Fire form with Fire / Dragon typing.
